channel.title: Problem with "Autodeploy on push" on Vercel
channel.description: Hi. I'm trying to enable autodeploy on push on vercel, but so far [this is what gets deployed](https://mecharaf.vercel.app). [Here's the project repo](https://github.com/vicradon/mecharaf)

item.title: Problem with "Autodeploy on push" on Vercel
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
vicraph7:

But since autodeploy can be enabled after initial deployment from the CLI, I can always work with that.

Cool, so I’m guessing you don’t need anything from us at this point. Hit us up here in the forums if you need help with anything else.

Read full topic
item.source: Problem with "Autodeploy on push" on Vercel

item.title: Problem with "Autodeploy on push" on Vercel
item.dc:creator: vicraph7
item.description:
I expect that the website can be deployed without the vercel CLI.

But since autodeploy can be enabled after initial deployment from the CLI, I can always work with that.

Thanks for building such an awesome tool!

Read full topic
item.source: Problem with "Autodeploy on push" on Vercel

item.title: Problem with "Autodeploy on push" on Vercel
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @vicraph7

Could you explain in more detail what the problem that you’re experiencing is please. What are you expecting to see deployed? How does what is actually deployed differ from your expectation?

Read full topic
item.source: Problem with "Autodeploy on push" on Vercel

item.title: Problem with "Autodeploy on push" on Vercel
item.dc:creator: vicraph7
item.description:
Hi.
I’m trying to enable autodeploy on push on vercel, but so far this is what gets deployed. Here’s the project repo
